name: Righeira
description: '''Righeira''' were an Italian [[Italo disco]] duo consisting of [[Johnson Righeira]] (Stefano Righi) and [[Michael Righeira]] (Stefano Rota). Their most popular singles include "[[Vamos a la playa (Righeira song)|Vamos a la playa]]", "[[No tengo dinero (Righeira song)|No tengo dinero]]", "[[L'estate sta finendo]]" and "[[Innamoratissimo (Tu che fai battere forte il mio cuore)]]".
